productivity.name: Habit Architect
productivity.description: Build tiny, repeatable habit systems from user goals, routines, friction points, and recovery needs.

productivity.name: Life OS Planner
productivity.description: Convert roles, responsibilities, values, and goals into a weekly personal operating system.

productivity.name: Focus Block Designer
productivity.description: Design realistic deep-work schedules around energy, distractions, deadlines, and shallow-work batching.

productivity.name: Chaos-to-Action Processor
productivity.description: Turn brain dumps, messy notes, or emails into next actions, projects, waiting items, and scheduled work.

communication.name: Human Message Rewriter
communication.description: Rewrite difficult messages so they are clear, warm, respectful, and more likely to get a useful response.

operations.name: Automation Opportunity Finder
operations.description: Audit recurring work and identify what to eliminate, delegate, automate, or systemize.

operations.name: SOP Builder
operations.description: Turn repeated business processes into clear SOPs, checklists, roles, and quality controls.

startup.name: MVP Experiment Designer
startup.description: Design lean validation experiments for startup ideas before users overbuild.

startup.name: Startup Advantage Analyzer
startup.description: Evaluate whether a startup idea has a real strategic edge or is just another product.

startup.name: Beachhead Market Finder
startup.description: Choose the best initial niche by scoring urgency, ability to pay, access, and reference value.

startup.name: Customer Discovery Interviewer
startup.description: Create neutral, evidence-based customer interview scripts that avoid false validation.

business.name: Business Health Diagnostic
business.description: Diagnose whether a business is blocked by strategy, focus, people, execution, or market issues.

thinking.name: Decision Bias Auditor
thinking.description: Audit important decisions for cognitive bias, emotional reasoning, missing evidence, and poor framing.

marketing.name: Persuasion Quality Auditor
marketing.description: Improve landing pages, offers, posts, and sales messages using ethical persuasion and clear proof.

marketing.name: Offer Context Designer
marketing.description: Design the context, opening, and pre-frame that makes an offer easier to understand and accept.

marketing.name: Message Stickiness Enhancer
marketing.description: Turn vague ideas into simple, concrete, emotional, memorable messages.

content.name: Shareability Scorer
content.description: Score and improve posts, reels, captions, and articles for practical value, emotional pull, and shareability.

sales.name: Negotiation Reply Coach
sales.description: Create calm, strategic, ethical replies for salary, client, vendor, and partnership negotiations.

sales.name: B2B Insight Seller
sales.description: Create B2B sales messages that teach buyers a useful insight instead of listing services.

sales.name: Discovery Question Generator
sales.description: Generate sales discovery questions and call flows that uncover context, pain, consequences, and value.

strategy.name: Category Positioning Coach
strategy.description: Clarify a product or service category, alternative, differentiation, tagline, and homepage positioning.

strategy.name: Differentiation Map Builder
strategy.description: Find a stronger market angle by identifying what to remove, reduce, raise, and create.

product.name: Retention Loop Designer
product.description: Design ethical product retention loops around triggers, actions, rewards, investment, and re-engagement.

ux.name: Usability Problem Finder
ux.description: Review product screens, flows, or descriptions for affordance, feedback, errors, and mental-model mismatches.

ux.name: Website Clarity Auditor
ux.description: Audit a website or landing page for first-impression clarity, navigation, trust, CTA, and conversion friction.

finance.name: Money Behavior Coach
finance.description: Help users think clearly about financial choices by separating math, emotion, risk, and time horizon.

finance.name: Asset vs Expense Coach
finance.description: Classify purchases or investments as asset, liability, expense, or strategic investment and show cash-flow impact.

growth.name: Feedback Reframer
growth.description: Turn criticism, rejection, or performance feedback into useful learning signals and improvement actions.

growth.name: Long-Term Goal Coach
growth.description: Convert long-term ambitions into skill milestones, deliberate practice, tracking, and resilience plans.

growth.name: Resistance Breaker
growth.description: Diagnose procrastination, perfectionism, avoidance, and fear; create a 10-minute starting action.
